title: The Man in Search of His Murderer
writer: Ludwig Hirschfeld, Ernst Neubach, Curt Siodmak
actors: Heinz Rühmann, Lien Deyers, Raimund Janitschek
plot: A man in bad sorts hires a burglar to later kill him, then changes his mind when his fortunes turn and must find the contracted murderer before it is too late.
